name: cybermaster-md
description: Zimbabwe's advanced WhatsApp AI Bot built on Node.js + Baileys MD. Speaks fluent Shona, handles commands, AI chat, translation, and Zim context. Engineered for speed, reliability, and local vibes. Developed by @cybermaster04.

SESSION_ID.description: Secure authentication session string used to connect the bot to WhatsApp Web. Get it from your pair site. Required to login without QR scanning.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Primary administrator WhatsApp number in international format. This number gets full bot control and owner commands.

DATABASE_URL.description: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, or MySQL connection URI for storing user data, logs, and settings. Optional but recommended for production.

BOT_NAME.description: Display name of the bot as seen in chats and menus. Customize to match your branding.

BOT_OWNER.description: Display name of the bot owner or developer. Shows in !menu and bot info.

PREFIXES.description: Command trigger prefixes separated by commas. Eg: . ! / Use !xmd menu to see commands.

PACKNAME.description: Default sticker pack name used when creating stickers with the bot.

COMMAND_MODE.description: Use 'public' to allow all users access, or 'private' to restrict usage to owner only.

TIMEZONE.description: System timezone for logs and time-based features. Use Africa/Harare for Zim time.

REMOVEBG_KEY.description: API key from remove.bg for automatic background removal on images.
